message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface "IVersionedMonoBehaviourInternal" <<I>> {
    UpgradeFromUnityThread() : void
}

class "VersionedMonoBehaviour" <<A>> {
    version : int = 0
    
    «virtual» Awake() : void
    «virtual» Reset() : void
    OnBeforeSerialize() : void
    OnAfterDeserialize() : void
    «virtual» OnUpgradeSerializedData(version:int, unityThread:bool) : int
    UpgradeFromUnityThread() : void
}

abstract class "ISerializationCallbackReceiver" <<C>> 
abstract class "MonoBehaviour" <<C>> 

' Relationships - using dashed lines for interfaces/abstractions to match visual style
VersionedMonoBehaviour .up.|> MonoBehaviour
VersionedMonoBehaviour ..|> ISerializationCallbackReceiver  
VersionedMonoBehaviour --|> IVersionedMonoBehaviourInternal

@enduml
